reviews.review_title: Great game for it's time... but
reviews.review_description: massively hampered by not having free movement and reliant on teleport. These days it's a deal breaker for some, and could have easily been updated, but this game is no longer supported. Also, once played through - no real point in playing again, as you have seen it all. Could have done with an endless mode, or a timed mode with the leaderboards. But as with most things, wants and wishes are pretty pointless when the developers have moved on. Probably overpriced for what you get, but a pretty good game from the early days of VR.

reviews.review_title: A classic that could use a sequel...
reviews.review_description:
My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

This was the first VR game I'd ever played and it was so much fun!  Maybe not impressive to very experienced gamers but it was amazing to me.  I struggled over buying it for a full day  after reading the bad reviews, thinking that maybe it didn't perform as well on the meta quest 3 - but it was every bit as awesome!  Hella fun!
All i have to say is: you can grab the bullets in the air

First vr game i ever played. Such a gem. Ripping apart robots and throwing them, grabbing bullets and throwing them. Cool its on the quest 3, but we need a new robo recall! More levels, more guns, co-op, grapples, jumping, free locomotion movement. Please I'm begging you lol.

reviews.review_title: Not as good as PC but
reviews.review_description:
But they did an amazing job porting it to standalone. What is here is very impressive. 

Come on do a Quest 3/4 update. Future proof this for posterity. 

Also, they gave it to me for having the PC version. Good guys.

reviews.review_title: Why cant there be more vr games like thi
reviews.review_description:
* free
* fun
* straightforward
* fluid controls
* singleplayer, yet challenging enemies
* not just a standstill shooter
Only issue: its too short
It's fun until you've played any other stable with VR game and realize you just got scammed for $30 on this one.

personally i think the campaign is a little short put the game play totally makes up for it with its insane amount of  things you can do to the robots you can throw them shoot them through trick shots it's insane and personally i think the fact that you can tear their limbs off  and use it as a weapon is insane and the handles the gun works and the upgrades on them perfect the replay ability is endless there's so many things i can think of to do personally one of the one of the best games i've played and i've had this vr for years

An excellent but relatively short lived experience, amazing what can be achieved on what people infer is a limited piece of hardware. Oculus quest when optimized correctly delivers!!!! Great fun, what gaming should be... Ranks up there as one of must experience apps .. as a psvr owner it's so refreshing not being told to turn around and face the camera!!! Enjoy.....

reviews.review_title: This game is still so fun in the big 26
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing, it’s so fun, it’s like bonelabs physics and with a actual good story. You can rip apart robots, head, arms and legs, hit other robots with limbs and them themselves and there is a lot of content. It’s about a 2 hour story but the replayability is great. I definitely recommend playing this game as, like I said still holds up to this day. PLAY IT!!!!!
It'd good. Endless mode when?

I don't understand why the 3 hour campaign is 30$. Why isn't there an endless mode like SUPERHOT? Endless would make this so much more fun. Not worth 30 for the limited amount of content. It's really fun but way to short.
No explanation robo recall is just an amazing game

The games is so short and they should give you
A refund even if you played it for more
Than two

reviews.review_title: Wonderful start for new quest users
reviews.review_description:
Wonderful game and the freedom you can do to certain extent. 

To the developers, can we get a locomotion free movement instead of just teleportation?

reviews.review_title: One of the best games ever but
reviews.review_description: I'm begging the developers please please give us a smooth turning smooth locomotion as well as teleport is the only update that this game needs everything else is beyond perfect please give us smooth turning and smooth locomotion please please I can guarantee if this update is granted all who previously purchased this game will definitely go right back to it immediately that's the only update that it needs I've seen it done with the mod so it's definitely possible I asked you it be done for the quest to quest 3s and the quest 3 please please give us this update please developers this one update smooth locomotion

reviews.review_title: I want to return the game pls
reviews.review_description: It is just nit good at all I Mean the weapons work but teleporting man really that bad and completely destroyed the game in my opinion
Way more than $20 worth of fun.

reviews.review_title: One of my all-time favorite VR games
reviews.review_description: If you like iRobot, enjoy great humor, and love action games, this is truly an experience you can’t miss. Would love to see this upgraded for Quest 3 graphics capabilities but even without it the game still looks and plays great.
I like tearing peoples limbs off and this is the best legal substitute I could find. Great job!
This is just what all vr games should strive to be.

reviews.review_title: The game I come back to
reviews.review_description: This game is one  I come back to any time I am in the mood for VR but not sure of what to play.
I have been playing this for a few years. It's very fun, and cool action style.

Fun game ,but it needs updating. It would be great to have co-op play to extend replayability and to play with other Meta users. Let's get social Meta Studios!!!!!!!!

Developed but never updated to fit the capabilities of Quest 2 and 3. The game play is outdated and the lack of smooth movement options and coop play options is telling. Not worth its current price and the developers don't appear to care about player experience and current concerns.

reviews.review_title: Fun as hell but really needs updates
reviews.review_description: I feel like the robots go down to easily and it should take more effort to take them down with Melee, and graphics need an overhaul for quest 3, and the only main problem I have is that there’s so little customizability in the settings, there need to be more options like controller mapping, and locomotion settings. I hate that fact that their is no option to change if you teleport or walk and it needs to be an option

reviews.review_title: Played for 30 min won’t let me refund

reviews.review_description:
It’s just long enough so that you can’t quite finish it in time to refund it.   There are only nine levels, at about five minutes each. The runtime is padded out to over the refundable 2hour limit by monologues and loading screens. 

You can keep grinding, of course-most folks won’t completely unlock any of the weapons before they hit the end credits

reviews.review_title: No cloud save and no data elsewhere
reviews.review_description:
Have fun rewatching the intro and playing the tutorial again every time the oculus has issue. Oculus support won’t read the ticket you submit and will tell you to factory reset you device as a common troubleshooting step.. Because this game doesn’t cloud save and also doesn't save game data in the android->data files, know that you will lose your saved data at one point or another because the devs are too lazy to implement cloud save. 
For Pete’s sake, just make the opening cut scene and tutorial level skippable. Please!
I hate that I bought the quest 2 and that FB keeps messing things up. 
On my 3 time playing the intro because I had to return a quest for bad lenses and now had to factory reset mine for corrupted account data. 
Any game designer that's too lazy to implement the cloud save shouldn't get our money!
This SUCKS!
Way too short. Also, repetitive for the very few levels available. It would be awesome for like $5... dont pay full price for this!

It's a fantastic game, but it has one con: it is really short. The game is really immersive and makes you feel really cool as your tear robots apart. It only has about 5-6 hours of play time in story mode, but at least you can replay levels.

***2926 updated review.

I resumed playing RR on my Quest 3, in fact I don't even recall writing my original review it's been so long since I played.

What I can say is the Devs ended up fixing the game however from what I am aware of Epic has pulled it from the Horizon store, so if you're lucky enough to own it in 2026 you are one of the few.

One of my original purchases on the CV1 and still a great game to this day!!!

-----Old review-----

I love this game on my Rift, no so on my Quest 2: unfortunately once Ieave the tutorial or enter the Oculus home, or reset my view... my guns stop working. Super frustrating devs, look into the issues every Quest 2 owner has mentioned. 

Fix this stuff so the game works and my rating will riiiiise.
The graphics are good but the game play overall feels very dated. It’s boring as not much variety of locations or enemies.
Sorry, don't enjoy it.
Needs more gameplay

This game is pretty cool , love the graphics and the concept of the game . Just wish the game had more guns , along with side missions , mini games  or free roam . Also wish they had a multiplayer, I could see that being really fun especially with the graphics!

A very nice game fun. The game is a nice work out great graphics the story needs flushed out a little more. challenging  game love the combat  top A plus game well worth the buy cant wait to finsh game to run the world story and see how it plays out very addicting.  Keep up the good work hope to see more games with this high quality.
Good

Super loved this game when I first played it couple of years ago. Even thou the graphic on the quest was toned down, this game is just as fun as I remembered. Some people might be a little skeptical about the teleportation style game play, but you can pull of some crazy stuff once you can get used to the control!
It’s a fun challenge and such a good shooter I have one problem the only movement is teleporting
